channel.title: Linkedin on Imlauer
channel.description: Recent content in Linkedin on Imlauer

item.title: Sabiduría de George Hotz
item.description:
Partes del Linkedin.

https://www.linkedin.com/comm/feed/update/activity:7442111103658229760?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_notification_digest_01%3BE%2FMYw%2BvSTTaKH3gwPpiCKQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQEi3wpUlWi58Q&midSig=0nIUnyYRSafYc1&trk=eml-email_notification_digest_01-hero_notification_cta-0-SHARED_BY_YOUR_NETWORK&trkEmail=eml-email_notification_digest_01-hero_notification_cta-0-SHARED_BY_YOUR_NETWORK-null-rn6k97~mn501kfw~r1-null-null-u4zcJf0tR1yNurRtwrriIQ%3D%3D&eid=rn6k97-mn501kfw-r1&otpToken=MTMwMzE5ZTExNzJjY2RjNWI0MjkwZmViNDExOWUzYjc4N2NlZDE0MzliYWI4NzYzN2JjNjAxNjk0YTVmNWFmM2YwZDFkN2U0MThlMmUzZDI3YjkyZWZiMDMwYWJhZDNmODUwMDBhNGEzNWFiYjY4ZTgwNWJmYzEzNmIsMSwx

NVIDIA es una empresa de software.

“Anyone else notice a big uptick in spam recently? I guess all that AI is good for something. I have a proposal:

Let’s round up a bunch of spammers and select one for a public hanging. The worst one chosen with American Idol style voting. Then we all go watch it go down, it’ll be a spectacle for the ages. More views than the super bowl, companies make money on commercials, etc… And it will have an incredible chilling effect on spam.
